overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character exploring a Japanese temple complex in autumn. The character traverses from a waterfall overlook through dense red maple forests and pine groves with stone statues, ultimately approaching and crossing a wooden bridge leading to a five-story pagoda.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall overlook with view of temple complex

events.description: character leaves waterfall area and enters dense red maple forest

agents.ego_description: walking up rocky terrain from stream level toward forest path, overlooking traditional temple architecture in the valley below

entered.detail: rushing water flowing over rocks at character's feet
large wooden temple structure with curved roof visible across the valley
small wooden bridge visible in the distance spanning the water
moss-covered rock face with water flowing down
stone staircase leading up the hillside to the left

segments.scene_description: The character stands at a waterfall overlook with a stream rushing below. A traditional Japanese temple complex is visible in the distance across the valley, with a wooden bridge spanning the water. The character walks up from the water's edge toward a forest path.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense red maple forest with enclosed canopy

events.description: light shifts to red-tinged diffuse light filtering through dense red maple canopy
character pushes through low-hanging red maple branches

agents.ego_description: walking through dense forest path covered in fallen red maple leaves, pushing through branches

entered.detail: dense overhead canopy of bright red maple leaves creating red-tinted lighting
tall boulders and rock outcroppings flanking the forest path
narrow dirt trail covered in fallen red leaves

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dense forest of red maple trees where the light shifts to a vivid red hue. The path is covered in fallen red leaves, and large rock formations flank the trail. The character pushes through low-hanging branches as the canopy encloses overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain forest path with stone Buddha statues

events.description: stone Buddha statues appear along the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along mountain path passing stone Buddha statues seated among pine trees

entered.detail: multiple stone Buddha statues seated in meditation poses along the path
tall pine trees replacing the maple forest
traditional Japanese lanterns hanging from wooden posts

segments.scene_description: The forest transitions from red maples to tall pines as the character walks along a mountain path. Stone Buddha statues appear seated along the right side among the trees, and hanging lanterns mark the path. Large rock formations now loom closer on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: hilltop approach to pagoda with wooden bridge

events.description: five-story pagoda comes into view as character crests the hill
character slows approaching the wooden bridge entrance

agents.ego_description: walking uphill toward a large five-story pagoda, approaching a wooden bridge leading to the temple complex

entered.detail: tall black wooden pagoda with five tiers and curved roofs
wooden bridge with railings leading toward the pagoda

segments.scene_description: The character crests a hill and emerges from the pine forest into an open area where a magnificent five-story pagoda comes into view. The path leads toward a wooden bridge that spans a gap leading to the pagoda. The terrain is rocky and sparsely vegetated.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge and stone lantern path

events.description: character steps onto wooden bridge crossing toward pagoda
character exits bridge onto stone tile path

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge toward the pagoda, then continuing on stone path past traditional stone lanterns

entered.detail: traditional stone lanterns lining the path
stone paving tiles replacing the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a weathered wooden bridge with mossy railings, crossing toward the pagoda. After crossing, the path transitions to stone tiles lined with traditional stone lanterns. The pagoda now looms large on the right as the character approaches the temple complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a serene waterfall overlook through shifting forests toward a towering temple complex. It begins at the water's edge with a distant view of the valley before the camera follows the character up a path and into a dense grove of red maples, where the light shifts to a vivid crimson hue beneath a closing canopy. As the character pushes through low-hanging branches, the environment transitions from red maples to tall pines and rocky mountain trails lined with seated stone Buddha statues and hanging lanterns. The scene then opens as the character crests a hill, emerging from the pine forest into a rocky clearing that reveals a magnificent five-story pagoda in the distance. Finally, the camera moves across a weathered wooden bridge with mossy railings and onto stone tiles lined with lanterns as the pagoda looms large on the right.
